data.body: I've been watching some episodes of Pointless, a British game show that's essentially a mirror image of Family Feud. 4 pairs of contestants compete to find correct answers that the fewest people in the poll chose. There are bonuses if they answer something (correctly) no one in the poll did.
data.author: did:plc:prgirpu6za2df777ziwui4bj

data.body:
The bonus round for the winners has them getting their choice among 4 possible categories, different each episode. Before the list is revealed, the host asks what type of categories they're hoping for.

I suspect my answer here -- science & nature, mythology, or geography -- is not a typical combo.

data.body:
Long public callouts often spread more pain than they solve especially when suicide is involved. Out of concern, I don’t suggest making these kinds of posts…

Try private conversation, a trusted mediator, friend group, and so on. Public drama rarely brings real resolution and can/will hurt everyone.
